summary: Backend: 15/15 pytest passed (root, plans, routes, contact-info, calculate base/nocturno/sabado/domingo, B2C+B2B quote create, list, get, 404, status flow, stats). Frontend: Landing renders correctly (verified via screenshot - hero, models, plans, calculator, fleet, FAQ, footer, floating contact all visible and styled). Admin page loads stats + table with 3 rows; clicking a row opens a detailed modal with status buttons (Pendiente/Confirmado/En ruta/Entregado/Cancelado) - confirmed visually. Tracking page exposes input/submit. However, several data-testid attributes requested in the spec are MISSING on the Landing page and Admin modal, which prevents reliable automated testing of the calculator and quote-form flows.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid wrappers on Hero, ServiceModels, Plans, QuoteCalculator, CoverageMap, Footer
Inputs missing data-testid: calc-hour, calc-weight, calc-total, badge-nocturno, quote-nombre, quote-email, quote-telefono, quote-origen, quote-destino, quote-submit, quote-success
Modal opens correctly but lacks data-testid='admin-detail-modal'

action_items: Add the missing data-testid attributes listed above on Landing sections, QuoteCalculator inputs/submit/success, and Admin detail modal so the spec's automated testing requirements are met.

Calculator + quote-form B2C/B2B flows could not be exercised end-to-end via Playwright because of the missing testids - please add them and re-run UI tests. Backend POST /api/quotes was however validated directly and works (B2C and B2B).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses Pydantic Quote response_model and inserts dict with isoformat strings for created_at/updated_at - good. Persistence verified via list/get.
calculate_price weekend/nocturno logic matches spec exactly (verified by 4 dedicated tests).
Reference format TR + YYMMDD + 4 hex (12 chars) verified.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded with projection={'_id':0} in list/get/patch - verified no leakage.
ServiceModels and FloatingContact render OK from /api endpoints (contact-info returns whatsapp/telegram).
Resend email is no-op with empty RESEND_API_KEY as documented - safe.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 quotes via API during tests (TEST_Cliente B2C and TEST_Empresa B2B). They remain in the test DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. After main agent adds the missing data-testids on Landing/QuoteCalculator/Admin modal, re-run the Playwright flow that fills calc-hour=19, fills quote-* fields, clicks quote-submit, and verifies quote-success. Admin detail modal status buttons are visually present (Pendiente/Confirmado/En ruta/Entregado/Cancelado).
rca of the issue: Frontend testid gap is purely instrumentation - functional UI works (screenshots confirm). The spec explicitly requires these testids on key elements; main agent should add them to QuoteCalculator.jsx, Landing.jsx section wrappers, and Admin detail modal.
